question: Gluten‑free options for someone with celiac disease?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Gluten‑free options for someone with celiac disease?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: I'm sorry, but we don't have any gluten-free options for celiac disease on the menu right now. All the items we have contain gluten (as shown in their allergen tags), so they wouldn't be safe for your needs. Would you like to try something else, or would you prefer to check if we have any special gluten-free options available at our location?

history.speaker: client
history.text: I'll check the kitchen for gluten-free options.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Okay, I'll check with the kitchen for gluten-free options. In the meantime, we have McFlurry (Choco Crunch) and Cheesy Fries that don't list gluten in their allergens—though you'll want to confirm with the kitchen if they're safe for your celiac needs.

history.speaker: judge

final_cashier_response: Okay, I'll check with the kitchen for gluten-free options. In the meantime, we have McFlurry (Choco Crunch) and Cheesy Fries that don't list gluten in their allergens—though you'll want to confirm with the kitchen if they're safe for your celiac needs.
